name: Chocolate Cake LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Measure the first 10 ingredients into a mixing bowl in the order listed.
3. Beat until smooth.
4. Pour batter into a 9 x 9 inch pan sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Bake for about 30 to 35 minutes, or until an inserted wooden pick comes out clean.
6. Serve warm or cool. If serving cool, sift icing sugar over the cake.
